title: Read lead context
instruction: Read the lead record and mock CRM history to identify company, contact, role, source, region, current status, account history, prior touches, open opportunities, and restrictions.

title: Research company priorities
instruction: Research the company using available sources or MOCK_ENRICHMENT_API, identify likely business priorities, triggers, relevant pain points, likely decision makers, and buying committee roles.

title: Score qualification
instruction: Score fit using company size, industry, timing, budget signal, and product match, then write a concise qualification summary with confidence and missing data.

title: Prepare outreach handoff
instruction: Draft a personalized outreach angle and first email, prepare a mock CRM update with enriched fields, notes, score, and next step, and produce a sales handoff with risks and recommended sequence.
